message:
Fix proxy has-trap and writeStringToMemory memory leak

The proxy `has` handler didn't report "free" or Symbol.dispose as
existing properties, so `'free' in proxy` returned false — causing
doc slot exhaustion and eventual RangeError crash from negative WASM
pointers. Also fix writeStringToMemory to dealloc the full allocated
size (maxBytes) instead of the shorter written length.
